name: Grand Baton
description: '''Grand Baton''' is an [[Afro-Caribbean music|Afro-Caribbean]], [[progressive rock]] and [[Jazz|jazz fusion]] band based in New York City. The band was founded by the composer, arranger, guitarist, pianist, singer and songwriter Jean-Cristophe (JC) Maillard, a native of [[Pointe-à-Pitre]], Guadeloupe.
